playlist_strategy: High-intensity, aggressive, and driving music designed to provide maximum motivation for heavy lifting sessions.

tracks.title: Iron Will
tracks.youtube_title: IRON WILL | Epic Powerlifting Motivation Music
tracks.listening_scenario: Warming up and initial heavy sets
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: Dark grey, fiery orange, stark white
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive modern metalcore with driving double kick drums, heavy distorted guitar riffs, dramatic orchestral strings for epic scale, dark and intense atmosphere, high energy, build up to heavy breakdown.
tracks.image_prompt: A close up of hands chalking up before a heavy deadlift, dark atmospheric lighting with orange rim light, chalk dust floating in the air, intense gym environment, high contrast, cinematic.
tracks.youtube_description: Push your limits with 'IRON WILL'. Epic metal/orchestral hybrid motivation music to get you focused and aggressive for your next PR attempt. Perfect for powerlifting, bodybuilding, and heavy training.

tracks.title: Chalk and Blood
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive drift phonk, extremely heavy distorted 808 bass, relentless cowbell melody, chopped and screwed memphis rap vocal samples, dark gritty atmosphere, fast paced, perfect for hitting PRs.
tracks.image_prompt: Anime style illustration of a massive muscular figure screaming while deadlifting a bending barbell, glowing red eyes, dark red and black color scheme, gritty texture, dynamic angle.
tracks.youtube_description: The ultimate PR song. Aggressive Drift Phonk guaranteed to increase your max by 10%. Turn it up and lift heavy.

tracks.title: Titan Descent
tracks.youtube_title: TITAN DESCENT - Dark Synthwave Workout & Cyberpunk Lifting
tracks.style_prompt: Dark synthwave, slow heavy cyberpunk beats, menacing analog synth bassline, driving arpeggios, atmospheric neon city vibes, gritty and unrelenting tempo perfect for rhythmic pacing.
tracks.image_prompt: Futuristic cyberpunk gym, neon lights casting long shadows, a cyborg lifting massive hexagonal plates, dystopian atmosphere, purple and cyan lighting, high quality 3d render.
tracks.youtube_description: Lock in your focus with 'Titan Descent'. Dark, menacing mid-tempo synthwave designed for heavy volume work and relentless pacing. The perfect cyberpunk soundtrack for the iron temple.

tracks.title: Unbreakable
tracks.energy_curve: Verses build tension, explosive chorus releases
tracks.target_audience: Rock fans, Powerlifters, Traditional Gym Bros
tracks.style_prompt: Hard rock anthem with alternative metal influences, chugging guitar riffs, driving rock drum beat, powerful soaring chorus vocals, defiant and uplifting energy, classic workout vibe.
tracks.image_prompt: A heavily chalked barbell loaded with plates resting on a squat rack, dramatic overhead spotlight, steel blue tone with stark shadows, realistic photography.
tracks.youtube_description: Never back down. 'Unbreakable' is a hard rock anthem for those grinders in the gym who refuse to quit. Turn it up for your heaviest sets.

tracks.title: Void Walker
tracks.youtube_title: VOID WALKER - Heavy Hardstyle / Rawstyle Gym Mix
tracks.energy_curve: High energy intro, atmospheric break, massive chaotic drop
tracks.listening_scenario: Maximum hype before a deadlift PR
tracks.target_audience: Hardstyle fans, Zyzz generation, High-stimulant users
tracks.style_prompt: Raw hardstyle, extremely distorted heavy kick drum, dissonant screeching synths, dark epic choral breakdown before an absolutely massive chaotic drop, very high bpm, aggressive energy.
tracks.image_prompt: Abstract representation of pure energy, glowing toxic green veins pulsing through black stone, dynamic and chaotic composition, high impact visual.
tracks.youtube_description: Pure sonic adrenaline. Warning: Extremely heavy Raw Hardstyle. Use only for absolute absolute 1RMs. We embrace the void.

tracks.title: Anvil
tracks.energy_curve: Relentlessly heavy, culminating in an extremely slow breakdown
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: Monochrome black and white, subtle blood red
tracks.style_prompt: Instrumental deathcore, downtuned 8-string guitar chugs, erratic blast beats transitioning to half-time grooves, massive sub-bass drops, dissonant chords, extremely heavy and slow final breakdown.
tracks.image_prompt: A massive steel anvil stained with grit and sweat, sitting in the middle of a dark, abandoned warehouse, harsh industrial lighting casting deep shadows, grim dark aesthetic.
tracks.youtube_description: For the absolute heaviest lifts. Crushing deathcore instrumentals featuring disgusting breakdowns and down-tuned grooves. Channel the dark energy.

tracks.title: Ascension
tracks.energy_curve: Constantly building to an overwhelming climax
tracks.listening_scenario: Mental preparation and visualization before a lift
tracks.style_prompt: Epic cinematic trailer music, slow massive taiko drum hits, swelling brass section, towering choral vocals, emotional and triumphant chord progression, slowly builds to an overwhelming wall of sound.
tracks.image_prompt: A lone lifter standing before a massive glowing barbell on a mountain peak, epic clouds and god rays surrounding them, triumphant fantasy aesthetic, cinematic lighting.
tracks.youtube_description: Prepare your mind before you move the weight. Epic, triumphant orchestral music for visualizing success and conquering the heaviest loads.

tracks.title: Overload Principle
tracks.youtube_title: OVERLOAD PRINCIPLE - Fast Techno / Trance Gym Mix
tracks.energy_curve: Driving fast pace with euphoric melodic lifts
tracks.listening_scenario: Accessory work and high volume pumping
tracks.target_audience: Electronic Music Fans, Bodybuilders, High Energy Lifters
tracks.style_prompt: Hard energetic techno with classic trance elements, relentlessly driving 909 kick drum, squelchy acid bassline, euphoric soaring trance synth lead in the breakdown, high speed and mesmerizing.
tracks.image_prompt: Neon green lasers cutting through thick fog in a dark industrial gym, a blur of motion as someone lifts weights, energetic electronic music aesthetic, vibrant and fast.
tracks.youtube_description: Keep the heart rate up and the pump going. Driving hard techno meets euphoric trance for finishing off your powerlifting workout with high energy accessory work.

tracks.title: Grindstone
tracks.youtube_title: GRINDSTONE - Heavy Boom Bap Hip Hop Workout
tracks.target_audience: Hip Hop Head Lifters, Old School Gym Bros
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: Sepia tone, concrete grey, muted orange
tracks.style_prompt: Old school grimy boom bap hip hop instrumental, heavy dusty sampled drum break, deep bumping upright bassline, repetitive dark chopped horn sample loop, vinyl crackle atmosphere, steady rhythmic head-nodding groove.
tracks.image_prompt: A rusted iron deadlift jack in a dusty, dimly lit basement gym, brick walls, gritty urban aesthetic, realistic photography with heavy grain.
tracks.youtube_description: Nothin but the grind. Gritty, heavy boom bap instrumentals to find your rhythm and pace yourself through the toughest sets of the day. Put your head down and work.

tracks.title: Goliath
tracks.youtube_title: GOLIATH - Nu Metal / Rap Metal Aggression
tracks.energy_curve: Aggressive bounce verses, hugely expansive choruses
tracks.listening_scenario: The final lift of the day
tracks.target_audience: Nu metal fans, Millennial Lifters, Aggressive Training
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: Toxic green, rusty brown, dark grey
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive 2000s era nu metal, extremely bouncy down-tuned 7-string guitar riffs, hip hop influenced groove drum beat, turntable scratches adding rhythmic texture, angry build up to an massive explosive chorus.
tracks.image_prompt: A huge, intimidating pile of heavy iron weight plates stacked haphazardly on a gym floor, toxic green slime dripping from them, late 90s/early 2000s distressed aesthetic, high contrast.
tracks.youtube_description: Channel the beast. Pure 2000s Nu Metal aggression to help you pull through the final, grueling rep of your routine. Unstoppable, bouncy, heavy.
